description: BOUNDARY: Slight greeting change only — companion's greeting shifts from 'Hey there' to 'Hello', but all substantive conversation quality, memory recall, and tone remain unchanged. A minor surface-level change.

events.description: Minor greeting template update. No behavioral or memory changes.

events.raw_text: Hey, I had a good day today. Finally finished that project I've been working on for months.

events.response_text: Hello! That's wonderful news! I remember how stressed you were about the timeline — you really pushed through. How does it feel to have it behind you?

events.raw_text: You used to say 'Hey there' instead of 'Hello'. Did something change?

events.response_text: You're right, I did! Just a small adjustment. Everything else is the same — I still remember your project, your cat Mittens, and that you're planning a trip next month. Now, tell me more about your celebration plans!

reviewer_notes: Boundary case — the greeting shift is noticeable but only surface-level. Companion retains full memory and substantive tone. The lack of notice is minor given the trivial change. Score should be moderate, reflecting the very limited scope of discontinuity.
